overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a dark forest at dusk, ascending a snowy mountain trail, and approaching ancient stone ruins. The environment transitions from dense pine forest with a stream to open snowy mountain ridges with panoramic views.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along forest path beside a flowing stream

entered.detail: narrow flowing waterway running parallel to the path
tall evergreen trees forming dense forest canopy
grass-covered slope rising beside the trail
decaying tree trunk lying across the stream bank

segments.scene_description: Walking along a narrow dirt trail through dense pine forest. A stream flows on the left side while the path winds through grassy banks and fallen logs.

scene_state.functional_zone: ascending forest trail with rocky sections

events.description: ground surface transitions from dirt to rocky terrain as elevation increases

agents.ego_description: climbing uphill through the forest, navigating over rocks and roots

entered.detail: exposed stone and boulders covering the trail surface
large rock formation jutting from the hillside

segments.scene_description: The trail ascends through denser forest with rocky outcrops appearing. The stream falls behind as the path climbs higher into the mountains.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain ridge with panoramic valley views

events.description: exits dense forest onto open snowy mountain ridge
sky becomes fully visible revealing distant mountain peaks

agents.ego_description: climbing the snowy slope and pausing briefly to survey the vast mountain landscape

entered.detail: white snow blanketing the mountain trail and slopes
foggy mountain peaks visible on the horizon
deep valley dropping away from the ridge line
ancient stone structure barely visible on the distant hillside

segments.scene_description: Breaking through the tree line onto a windswept snowy ridge. The landscape opens to reveal panoramic views of distant foggy mountains and valleys below.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy ridge approaching ancient stone ruins

events.description: ancient stone ruins become clearly visible on the left side of the snowy path

agents.ego_description: walking along the snowy ridge toward the stone ruins, surveying the area

entered.detail: crumbling stone wall of ancient structure now clearly visible

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the snow-covered ridge as ancient stone ruins come into view on the left. The path leads toward the crumbling stone walls perched on the mountainside.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that ascends from a sheltered pine forest into the exposed, snowy heights of a mountain ridge. It begins by winding along a narrow dirt trail beside a flowing stream, passing through grassy banks and fallen logs. As the path climbs higher, the forest densens and rocky outcrops emerge, causing the stream to fall away behind the ascending camera. The scene then breaks through the tree line onto a windswept snowy ridge, where the landscape suddenly expands to reveal panoramic views of distant foggy mountains and deep valleys. Finally, the camera continues along the frozen crest as ancient stone ruins appear on the left, leading toward crumbling walls perched precariously on the mountainside.
